items.title: pytest documentation
items.note: Official pytest docs — start with 'Getting started' and 'How-to guides'.

items.title: Python unittest module
items.note: Standard-library alternative; pytest is more popular but unittest is xUnit-style and ships with Python.

items.title: Martin Fowler — UnitTest
items.note: Definition and history of the unit-test term; clarifies 'sociable' vs 'solitary' styles.

items.title: Mike Cohn — The Test Pyramid
items.note: Practical write-up of the pyramid heuristic by Ham Vocke on Fowler's site.

items.title: Real Python — Effective Python Testing With Pytest
items.note: Hands-on tutorial covering discovery, fixtures, parametrize and plugins.
